
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for HF w. bond length 1.05 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 10, Number of orbitals: 11
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 4 active virtual orbitals (out of 6 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -100.0997273747992 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.1301627113047998 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -104.516429 Hartree @ iterations 169.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
